questionHtml:
In transcription, which enzyme has a role similar to that of helicase in replication?

A.  DNA polymerase III

B.  Ligase

C.  RNA polymerase

D.  DNA polymerase I

meta.title: In transcription, which enzyme has a role similar to that of helicase in replication? A. DNA polymerase III B. Ligase C. RNA polymerase D. DNA polymerase I
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.1. Transcription as the synthesis of RNA using a DNA template
